macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Reach $238-284 Million in Past 24 Hours, Mostly Shorts
items.summary: Network-wide cryptocurrency futures liquidations totaled $238-284 million, with shorts hit hardest at $181-218 million amid market volatility; BTC saw $113 million and ETH $33 million in liquidations.

items.title: Bitcoin Rallies on Iran's New Proposal to End War Against U.S.
items.summary: Bitcoin price rallied following Iran's delivery of a new proposal aimed at ending hostilities with the U.S., boosting market sentiment amid geopolitical developments.

items.title: SBI Holdings Plans Acquisition of BitBank Exchange
items.summary: Ripple partner SBI Holdings announced plans to acquire Japanese crypto exchange BitBank, potentially expanding its footprint in the region.

items.title: Visa Partners with SBI VC Trade for BTC, ETH, XRP Rewards on Credit Cards
items.summary: Visa has teamed up with Ripple affiliate SBI VC Trade to enable Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP rewards through credit cards in Japan.

items.title: Tom Lee’s Bitmine Acquires 10,000 ETH from Ethereum Foundation
items.summary: Bitmine, led by Tom Lee, purchased 10,000 ETH directly from the Ethereum Foundation, causing BMNR stock to climb.

items.title: Binance Delists 23 Altcoins, Triggering Major Price Declines
items.summary: Binance removed 23 altcoins from its platform, leading to sharp price drops for the affected tokens.

items.title: Gemini Secures Major CFTC License for Derivatives Trading
items.summary: Gemini exchange received authorization from the CFTC to operate as a Derivatives Clearing Organization, advancing U.S. regulatory compliance.

items.title: X Rolls Out Bitcoin, ETH, XRP Cashtags with Real-Time Data
items.summary: Elon Musk's X platform launched Smart Cashtags for crypto assets like BTC, ETH, XRP on web, despite Musk calling most cryptos scams.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Apple Discontinues 256GB Mac mini, Now Starts at 512GB for $799
items.summary: Apple has globally stopped offering the 256GB storage option for the Mac mini, with the base model now featuring 512GB storage starting at $799 in the US. This change affects the compact desktop's entry-level configuration.

items.title: Canonical and Ubuntu Servers Down After Sustained Cross-Border Attack
items.summary: Servers operated by Ubuntu and its parent company Canonical have been offline for over a day due to a sustained cross-border cyber attack that began on Thursday morning. The outage impacts key services from the popular Linux distribution.

items.title: Nissan Abandons Plans for US EV Plant, Scrapping 200,000 Annual Capacity
items.summary: Nissan has canceled its plans to build an electric vehicle manufacturing plant in the US, which was intended to produce 200,000 EVs per year. The decision marks a setback for the company's EV expansion in North America.

items.title: Microsoft's Xbox Mode Begins Rolling Out to Windows 11 PCs
items.summary: Microsoft is introducing an Xbox mode on Windows 11 PCs, providing a console-like interface for gaming directly on the operating system. This update enhances the gaming experience on non-console hardware.

items.title: Oura Ring Adds Detailed Hormonal Health Insights to Series 3 and 4
items.summary: Oura has updated its Series 3 and 4 smart rings with more comprehensive hormonal health tracking, including potential side effects from various birth control methods. The feature aims to provide users with deeper wellness data.

items.title: Meta Threatens to Withdraw Apps from New Mexico Over State Demands
items.summary: Meta has warned it may pull its apps from New Mexico if a judge approves the state's proposed requirements. The dispute highlights ongoing tensions between social media platforms and regulatory demands.
